portfolioId.description: A unique identifier for the portfolio

ownerId.description: A unique identifier for the owner of the portfolio

assets.description: A list of assets in the portfolio

type.description: The type of asset (e.g., stock, bond)

quantity.description: The quantity of the asset owned

currentValue.description: The current value of the asset

totalValue.description: The total value of the portfolio

createdAt.description: The date and time when the portfolio was created
